title: Carrier Swarm Mission
description: A schema for recording an inference relay mission between a central carrier model and multiple specialized wing models.

mission_id.description: A unique identifier for the carrier-swarm inference mission.

mission_type.description: The type of mission being recorded.

description.description: A short human-readable description of the mission.

carrier_node.description: The central carrier model or coordination node.

id.description: Unique identifier for the carrier node.

role.description: Primary role of the carrier node.

model_class.description: Class or size category of the carrier model.

activation_mode.description: How the carrier node is activated.

wing_nodes.description: A list of lightweight specialized wing models or agents participating in the mission.

id.description: Unique identifier for the wing node.

role.description: Role assigned to the wing node.

model_class.description: Class or size category of the wing node.

local_inference.description: Optional local inference result generated by the wing node.

early_exit_recommended.description: Whether the wing node recommends ending the mission without carrier activation.

escalation_recommended.description: Whether the wing node recommends escalation to the carrier node.

relay_cycle.description: Ordered stages of the carrier-swarm inference relay.

activation_policy.description: Policy for deciding when the carrier node should be activated.

central_activation.description: Default activation policy for the carrier node.

early_exit_enabled.description: Whether the mission can terminate before carrier activation.

escalation_required_when.description: Conditions that require escalation to the carrier node.

confidence_threshold.description: Optional threshold below which escalation is required.

escalation.description: Optional record of whether and why the carrier node was activated.

carrier_activated.description: Whether the carrier node was activated.

reason.description: Reason for carrier activation or non-activation.

triggered_by.description: Wing nodes or policy conditions that triggered escalation.

trace.description: Trace requirements and logging configuration for the mission.

receipt_required.description: Whether a trace receipt is required.

contribution_logging.description: Whether wing and carrier contributions must be logged.

energy_logging.description: Energy logging requirement for the mission.

human_review_required.description: Whether human review is required before finalization.

trace_record_id.description: Optional identifier for an external trace receipt or audit record.

human_review.description: Optional human review boundary and status.
